LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER FIRST PROVIDEN LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS (TOTAL: $62,662.61). COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER FIRST PROVIDEN LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FEBRUARY 7, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE FIRST PROVIDIEN LLC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES 2.6B AND 2.6C. FIRST PROVIDIEN MUST IMMEDIATELY DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS PETITION AND ALL SUPPORTING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Trasnfer Of Structured Settlemnt Payment Rights;
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Walsh, Esq., 775.853.0883, for petitioner First Providen LLC.
Mary Quitania, Respondent in pro per.
Peter Lightstone, Esq., for interested party Bershire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Nebraska.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER FIRST PROVIDEN LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Trasnfer Of Structured SettlemEnt Payment Rights (TOTAL: $62,662.61). COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Trasnfer Of Structured Settlemnt Payment Rights;
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Feb-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER FIRST PROVIDEN LLC's Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is continued on the court's own motion February 7, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give First Providien LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. First Providien must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its petition and all supporting papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
